rationale.R1.1: The artifact centers on a contribution claim ('first analytical tool to expose feasibility-vs-stringency tradeoffs') and an implicit gap statement about prior work. Strengthening requires sharpening the thesis and making the contribution claim more precisely bounded and credible.
rationale.R1.2: The argument has internal tension: the final paragraph repositions the contribution as 'the frontier methodology itself' after earlier paragraphs have led with empirical results. Making it stronger requires resolving this rhetorical drift and ensuring premises flow consistently to conclusions.
rationale.R1.4: Novelty is explicitly asserted ('first analytical tool') and the delta vs. prior work is articulated ('prior work has reported aggregate commitment statistics'). Strengthening the text requires making this novelty claim more defensible, specific, and clearly scoped.
rationale.R1.6: 'Make this stronger' most directly targets prose quality — sentence-level vigor, rhetorical momentum, elimination of hedging or redundancy, and sharper transitions. This is the load-bearing dimension: if the rewrite does not produce more forceful, precise prose, the delegation fails regardless of other improvements.
